title: Cynthia Sandherr
compiled_truth: Cynthia Sandherr is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-11-30 to 2001-11-26), Cynthia Sandherr sent 77 and received 401 emails, totalling 478 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (61), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (56), [Joe Hartsoe](people/joe-hartsoe) (43), [Joe Hillings](people/joe-hillings) (37), [Tom Briggs](people/tom-briggs) (32).
